zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Reade於1380年出生在英國奧可福爾肯登時，她的父親John Reade40歲，母親Cecilia Harlyungrugge37歲。她於大約1402年與Walter Cotton在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾坎布利其結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1445年5月在英國坎布利其爾藍德瓦德享年65歲，埋葬在英國坎布利其爾藍德瓦德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Reade于1380年出生在英国奧可福爾肯登时，她的父亲John Reade40岁，母亲Cecilia Harlyungrugge37岁。她于大约1402年与Walter Cotton在英国英格兰坎布利其爾坎布利其结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1445年5月在英国坎布利其爾藍德瓦德享年65岁，埋葬在英国坎布利其爾藍德瓦德。

nameMeanings.name: Reade
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Read
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Reed  .

History: A family called Read were established in America in the early 18th century by John Read, who was born in Dublin, sixth in descent from Sir Thomas Read of Berkshire, England. His son, George Read (1733–98), was one of the signers of the Declaration of Independence, and as a lawyer helped frame the Constitution.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Reade was born in 1380, in Checkendon, Oxfordshire, England, her father, John Reade, was 40 and her mother, Cecilia Harlyungrugge, was 37. She married Walter Cotton about 1402, in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died in May 1445, in Landwade, Cambridgeshire, England, at the age of 65, and was buried in Landwade, Cambridgeshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Reade est née en 1380, à Checkendon, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, John Reade, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Cecilia Harlyungrugge, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Walter Cotton environ 1402, à Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en mai 1445, à Landwade, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Landwade, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Reade 1380 in Checkendon, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Reade 40 und ihre Mutter Cecilia Harlyungrugge 37. Sie hat um 1402 in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom Walter Cotton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb im Mai 1445 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Landwade, Cambridgeshire, England und wurde in Landwade, Cambridgeshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Reade è nata il nel 1380 nel Checkendon, Oxfordshire, England, sua padre, John Reade, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Cecilia Harlyungrugge, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato Walter Cotton circa 1402, nel Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel maggio 1445, nel Landwade, Cambridgeshire, England, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolta a Landwade, Cambridgeshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Readeが1380年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアチェクエンドンで生まれた時，父John Readeは40歳，母Cecilia Harlyungruggeは37歳であった。約1402年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアカンブリッジでWalter Cottonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1445年5月にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアランドワドで65歳で死去し，イギリスカンブリジェシュアイアランドワドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Reade(이)가 1380년 영국 스퍼드실르 체c켄던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Reade(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cecilia Harlyungrugge(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 대략 1402년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 캄브리지에서 Walter Cotton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1445년 5월 영국 캄브리지실르 랜드웨이드에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 캄브리지실르 랜드웨이드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Reade nasceu em 1380, em Checkendon, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Reade, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Cecilia Harlyungrugge, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com Walter Cotton aproximadamente 1402, em Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em maio de 1445, em Landwade, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, com 65 anos, e foi sepultada em Landwade, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Reade родилась в 1380 г. в местности чеккендон, оксфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Reade было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecilia Harlyungrugge, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Walter Cotton около 1402 г. в местности камбридж, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла май 1445 г. в местности ландвад, камбриджешир, Англия в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности ландвад, камбриджешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Reade nació en 1380, en Checkendon, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Reade, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Cecilia Harlyungrugge, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Walter Cotton aproximadamente 1402, en Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en mayo de 1445, en Landwade, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultada en Landwade, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra.
